features.title: Enhanced Queue System
features.description: Improved bulk ticket import with better validation and Jira link generation

features.title: Session Timer Improvements
features.description: More reliable countdown timer with better synchronization across all participants

features.title: Voting Analytics
features.description: Enhanced vote distribution charts with consensus percentage indicators

features.title: Feature Notifications
features.description: Stay informed about new features with automatic update notifications when you visit the app

features.title: Dark Mode Support
features.description: Toggle between light and dark themes with persistent user preference

features.title: Reaction System
features.description: Send emoji reactions during voting sessions with floating animations

features.title: Administrator Panel
features.description: Monitor all active rooms and search voting history from admin interface
